title: Exporting in csv
excerpt: Currently we can only export boards in excel, it would be nice if monday can export boards in other formats like csv files instead of us having to go and manually convert the file to excel, just a suggestion.

posts.author: MarcoSteyn (Marco Steyn)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently we can only export boards in excel, it would be nice if monday can export boards in other formats like csv files instead of us having to go and manually convert the file to excel, just a suggestion.
